description.zh: 金朝由女真族完颜阿骨打建立，灭辽后入主中原。军政上以猛安谋克制为核心，兵民合一；行政上逐步采用汉制尚书省六部。女真尚武精神与汉制文治并行，形成独特的双重治理模式。
description.en: Founded by Wanyan Aguda of the Jurchen people, the Jin Dynasty conquered the Liao and ruled northern China. Its military-political core was the Meng'an-Mouke system combining soldiers and civilians. Administration gradually adopted Chinese-style Six Ministries under the Department of State Affairs, blending Jurchen martial tradition with Chinese civil governance.
